eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Colorado; at 3:46 AM on JUN 5, 2026 Effective until 4:46 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a monthly test from the Colorado Office of Emergency Manageemnt. If this had been an actual emergency an official message would have followed the tone alert you heard at the beginning of this message. No action is required.
